arts.ttl: Postecoglou explains what he's encouraged Bergvall, Gray and Djed Spence to do off the pitch
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou admits he has been encouraging young players like Lucas Bergvall, Archie Gray and Djed Spence to become leaders off the pitch as well as on it while calling on his senior stars to help Tottenham through their tough run. I think whenever you’re in a situation like ours, my experience tells me you do need the ones who’ve maybe been through the tougher times to lead you through it.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could consider triple Tottenham change vs Everton amid Yves Bissouma injury wait
arts.sum: James Maddison has not started a Premier League game for Tottenham since the home defeat against Liverpool but that run could come to an end this weekend. Going into the game 15th in the Premier League table as a result of Crystal Palace's win at West Ham on Saturday afternoon, Ange Postecoglou's team have to collect all three points at Goodison Park .

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Everton in the Premier League this afternoon with Ange Postecoglou’s position under pressure. A squad decimated by injuries has struggled for results this season and sit 14th in the table. Spurs were beaten 2-1 in the North London derby in midweek, the club’s 11th league defeat in just 21 matches. arts.ttl: What David Moyes has already learned after one week back at Everton as Ernest Nuamah talks continue
arts.sum: David Moyes said he had seen positive signs from his Everton players but remains of the belief that the group needs strengthening

arts.ttl: Everton vs Tottenham Hotspur – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host Tottenham Hotspur at Goodison Park this Sunday with both sides desperate for a win. David Moyes’ homecoming was spoilt by Aston Villa in the Toffees’ last game as they lost 1-0 at Goodison Park. arts.ttl: I thought I'd have played more for Everton this season - but I have no regrets about signing
arts.sum: Jake O'Brien has struggled for minutes but is determined to become a key part of Everton's future despite a tough start on Merseyside

arts.ttl: Everton vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Everton vs Tottenham in the Premier League, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou told only thing that will save Tottenham's season from 'disaster'
arts.sum: Big Ange is coming under pressure after a poor run of results that has left Spurs languishing in the bottom half of the Premier League table ahead of Sunday's trip to Everton

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars sent pointed message by Son Heung-min as Archie Gray admission made
arts.sum: EVERTON vs TOTTENHAM: Son Heung-min is looking to rally his Spurs troops as they bid to bounce back from the midweek north London derby defeat against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Frustrated Everton star Jake O'Brien insists Toffees are too good to go down
arts.sum: Everton are in deep trouble and they have won just one of their last 12 Premier League games, scoring just twice in that time, with David Moyes now replacing Sean Dyche
